prompt: User pastes resume + Brex Senior SWE Payments JD (strong match). Score and recommend.

assertions.text: Produces a 7-row scorecard table (title/level, industry, experience, IC vs leader, skills, years, overall) on a 0–10 scale
Overall score is 8.0 or higher (strong-fit JD warrants high score)
Includes a gap analysis section with 1–5 specific gaps
